sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: BreakingBusinessNetflix Will Acquire Warner Bros. In $83 Billion Deal—Discovery Will Be Split Off
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: The headline states the acquisition and spinoff as certain despite the article noting the deal is subject to regulatory approvals and may not close.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: Warner Bros. Discovery has reportedly entered exclusive talks with Netflix for a sale of its studio and TV businesses.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Uses “reportedly” without attributing the claim to a specific source in this sentence, leaving the assertion unsupported in the author’s voice.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: in move that follows a weeks-long bidding war in which the streaming giant beat out Paramount and Comcast.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Dramatizes the transaction with combative language (“bidding war,” “beat out,” “streaming giant”), adding a sensational tone beyond neutral description.
